[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 2/19 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be tripled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 2/19 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 2/26 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
